query:
INSERT INTO creditPacks (name, slug, credits, bonusCredits, price, sortOrder) VALUES
('Small Pack', 'small', 100, 0, 9.99, 1),
('Medium Pack', 'medium', 300, 100, 29.99, 2),
('Large Pack', 'large', 1000, 500, 99.99, 3)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=name;
